meta: Aqua NYC's Meta account (act_1057116046095292) is fully recovered and stable: $1,605 for 112 schedules at $14.3 CPA, the best efficiency in the portfolio.
Meta spend held roughly flat WoW at Aqua (-1 percent), eased at Hutong NYC (-6 percent) and Hutong Miami (-17 percent); combined Meta spend was $4,404.
Hutong Miami stays the costliest on Meta at $109.6 per schedule, still about 4x last year's $25.4.
google: Google spend rose at Aqua ($1,115) and Hutong NYC ($1,242) while Hutong Miami eased to $530.
Hutong NYC's Google efficiency improved to roughly $33 per booking on higher conversions (38).
Hutong Miami is weakest on Google at about $88 per booking on only 6 conversions.
ga4: Aqua NYC booked 280, down 7 percent WoW off a strong prior week but up 30 percent YoY (215).
Hutong NYC rebounded to 154 bookings, up 44 percent WoW; the -53 percent YoY against 330 reflects the discontinued referral and widget path rather than a genuine collapse.
Hutong Miami fell to 47 bookings, down 50 percent WoW as the late-June Meta push unwound, and behind 98 last year.
